series_metadata.series_description: This series contains copies of starff correspondence, routinely typed headings, case lists, group addresses, administrative resources information, records regarding resources available that agency has, who has received manuals and resources requested. This information is basically information used by support staff to allow for efficiency in typing, addressing and xeroxing.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: oney year end of fiscal year in which created or obsolete, whichever is later
